summary: Full stack testing of Radhya Micro Finance HR app. All 18 backend API tests pass. Frontend loads correctly with all major modules working. Two UX gaps identified: Leave application button missing (admin has no employee_id) and Exit Management lacks a 'Submit Resignation' button.

minor.issue: Returns 400 (not 500) for admin with no employee_id - acceptable behavior but should return more helpful message
Field names differ from what frontend form might expect: uses 'mobile' not 'phone', 'basic' not 'basic_salary', requires 'role' field

ui_bugs.issue: No 'Apply Leave' button visible for admin user (admin has no employee_id). Leave balance (CL/SL/EL) not displayed either. Regular employee view should show these.
No 'Submit Resignation' button visible. Page shows only a table. HR admin cannot initiate a resignation from this page.

issues: Stats cards show skeleton/loading state for ~2-3 seconds before showing data - acceptable but could be improved with faster load

action_items: Add 'Apply Leave' button on Leaves page (should be visible to employees with valid employee_id)
Add 'Submit Resignation' / 'Add Exit Request' button on Exit Management page for HR admin to submit on behalf of employees
Consider showing leave balance (CL/SL/EL) cards on Leaves page for employee users
critical_code_review_comments: Leave balance endpoint (/balance/my) returns 400 for admin with no employee_id - 400 is wrong, should be 404 or return a default balance structure

Employee employee list defaults to 'Active' filter - test shows 0 but 2 employees in dashboard - employees created via API may default to different status; check if status field defaults correctly on creation
Exit Management page completely lacks any way to create/submit a resignation - no 'Add Exit Request' button
seed_data_creation: 3 test candidates created via API tests (TEST_Candidate One). 2 test employees created (TEST_John Doe).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend 100% passing. Frontend: Login, Dashboard (stats), Employees (list, Add btn), Candidates (list, Add btn), Attendance (Punch In/Out visible), Payroll (Process btn), Performance (Create Review btn), Letters (Create btn), Settings (5 locations), Logout - all working. Missing: Apply Leave button and Submit Resignation button.

rca_of_issues.leave_apply_missing: The Leaves page (My Leaves tab) shows only a table of leave applications with no 'Apply Leave' button. Admin user has no employee_id so API returns 400 for /balance/my. Frontend may be conditionally hiding the button based on employee_id presence.
rca_of_issues.exit_submit_missing: Exit Management page renders only a data table with no action button to initiate a new exit/resignation request. This is a missing feature in the frontend Exit Management module.
